findingDetails.title: Phases 010-012 metadata schema diverges from 001-009 across 5+ fields
findingDetails.evidence: Phases 010-012 omit Parent Spec, Parent Packet, Predecessor, Successor fields; use mixed-case Status; introduce Branch field absent from 001-009
findingDetails.recommendation: Add missing metadata fields to phases 010-012 or document the schema divergence as intentional in parent spec.md

findingDetails.title: Phases 006-009 metadata missing Completed field present in 001-005
findingDetails.evidence: Phases 001-005 include Completed field after Created; phases 006-009 omit it entirely, creating an inconsistent timeline record at the chain midpoint
findingDetails.recommendation: Add Completed field with actual completion dates to phases 006-009 metadata tables

findingDetails.title: Phase 003 plan.md quality gate checkboxes unchecked despite COMPLETE
findingDetails.evidence: Definition of Ready and Definition of Done checkboxes are [ ] unchecked; phase spec.md shows Status COMPLETE with completion_pct 100; phase 006 plan.md correctly has [x] checked
findingDetails.recommendation: Mark all phase 003 plan.md quality gate checkboxes as [x]

findingDetails.title: All 12 child phases use zero fingerprints disabling session deduplication
findingDetails.evidence: Every child phase session_dedup.fingerprint is sha256:000...000; zero fingerprint renders dedup non-functional across entire phase parent
findingDetails.recommendation: Compute and set real session fingerprints or document the null-fingerprint convention in parent spec.md

findingDetails.title: Three distinct Status value conventions across 12 phases
findingDetails.evidence: Status values: uppercase COMPLETE (001-009), mixed-case Complete (010), prose-qualified (011), full-prose sentence (012); four distinct parseability classes
findingDetails.recommendation: Standardize Status values to a parseable enum across all 12 phases; move prose details to implementation-summary.md

noveltyJustification: Maintainability pass systematically inventoried pattern consistency across all 12 child phases. Six new P2 findings: (1) phase 006 plan.md completion_pct anomaly, (2) 010-012 metadata schema divergence beyond known Phase field gap (refinement of F-001-006 at 0.5x), (3) missing Completed field in 006-009, (4) phase 003 unchecked quality gates, (5) zero fingerprints defeating dedup across all 12, (6) three-to-four distinct status conventions. Weighted new=5.5, weighted total=22, ratio=0.250. No new P0/P1 — all documentation pattern consistency issues.
ruledOut: P0/P1 maintainability findings — all issues are documentation consistency at P2
Empty/placeholder content — all spot-checked plan.md/tasks.md are substantively complete
Code-level maintainability — spec-folder documentation review only
